title: Control of Single-Phase Grid-Connected Converters With LCL Filters Using Recurrent Neural Network and Conventional Control Methods
abstract: Single-phase grid-connected inverters are widely used to connect small-scale distributed renewable resources to the grid. However, unlike a three-phase system, control for a single-phase inverter is more challenging, especially when the inverter is used with an LCL filter. This paper proposes a novel recurrent neural network-based vector control method for a single-phase inverter with an LCL filte...
ai_summary: 该论文提出了一种基于递归神经网络的矢量控制方法，用于带有LCL滤波器的单相并网逆变器，相较于传统控制方法具有创新性，但未达到突破性水平。

title: Tiny Neural Network-Based Ultra-Local Model-Free Predictive Control for PMSMs
abstract: Aiming to address the lack of effective parameter-tuning strategies for model-free predictive controllers, this letter proposes an online self-learning approach using a tiny neural network. First, an incremental model-free predictive control scheme is introduced that incorporates a tiny neural network module. By analyzing the physical relationship between motor voltage and current, the input and o...
ai_summary: 该论文提出了一种基于微型神经网络的无模型预测控制方法，用于永磁同步电机（PMSMs）的超局部控制，具有在线自学习功能，创新性较强。

title: Reactive Power Control of Three-Phase Grid-Connected PV System During Grid Faults Using Takagi–Sugeno–Kang Probabilistic Fuzzy Neural Network Control
abstract: An intelligent controller based on the Takagi-Sugeno-Kang-type probabilistic fuzzy neural network with an asymmetric membership function (TSKPFNN-AMF) is developed in this paper for the reactive and active power control of a three-phase grid-connected photovoltaic (PV) system during grid faults. The inverter of the three-phase grid-connected PV system should provide a proper ratio of reactive powe...
ai_summary: 本文开发了一种基于Takagi-Sugeno-Kang型概率模糊神经网络的智能控制器，用于在电网故障期间对三相并网光伏系统的无功和有功功率进行控制。

title: Adaptive Type-2 Fuzzy Neural Network Inherited Terminal Sliding Mode Control for Power Quality Improvement
abstract: This article proposes an adaptive type-2 fuzzy neural network control system to enhance the performance of power quality improvement. First, the dynamic model of APF with lumped uncertainties caused by parameter perturbation of ac inductor and dc capacitor is briefly introduced. Then, an integral-type terminal sliding mode control (TSMC) is developed for the finite-time reference signal tracking. ...
ai_summary: 本文提出了一种自适应二型模糊神经网络控制系统的概念，用于提高电力质量。该系统通过积分型终端滑模控制实现了有限时间内的参考信号跟踪，对交流电感和直流电容参数扰动引起的不确定动态模型进行了简要介绍。这项研究在电力系统控制领域具有一定的创新性，特别是在处理不确定性和提高系统性能方面。

title: Intelligent Control of Microgrid With Virtual Inertia Using Recurrent Probabilistic Wavelet Fuzzy Neural Network
abstract: A microgrid with virtual inertia using master-slave control is proposed in this article to overcome the drawbacks of traditional inverter-based distributed generators for lack of inertia and without grid-forming capability. The microgrid using master-slave control is composed of a storage system, a photovoltaic (PV) system and a varying resistive three-phase load. The storage system and PV system ...
ai_summary: 本文提出了一种利用虚拟惯性控制微电网的智能控制方法，通过主从控制模式结合存储系统、光伏系统和可变电阻三相负载，解决了传统逆变器分布式发电机缺乏惯性和不具备电网形成能力的问题。该方法采用递归概率小波模糊神经网络，具有一定的创新性，但其实际应用效果和稳定性仍需进一步验证。

title: Dynamic Control of Isolated Network Microgrids: A Resilient Backpropagation Neural Network-Based Virtual Inertia Control Approach
abstract: In isolated networked microgrid with high penetration of solar and wind-based generation, maintaining system stability and achieving optimal dynamic performance poses significant challenges due to reduced mechanical inertia traditionally provided by synchronous generators. This paper introduces a novel Resilient Back Propagation Bayesian Neural network-based virtual inertia control strategy to enh...
ai_summary: 本文提出了一种基于弹性反向传播贝叶斯神经网络的虚拟惯性控制策略，用于提高孤立网络微电网的系统稳定性和动态性能。

title: A Low-Complexity Artificial Neural Network-Based Optimal Droop Gain Design Strategy for DC Microgrids Onboard the More Electric Aircraft
abstract: This article proposes a new droop control design method based on a “reversed data training” of artificial neural network (ANN). Conventionally, after data collection, the ANN is used for forward mapping the control variables (inputs) and system response (outputs). After training, the ANN model can be used for optimal control design for each specific system performance requirement either through cu...
ai_summary: 本文提出了一种基于人工神经网络(ANN)的“反向数据训练”的新型下垂控制设计方法，用于飞机直流微电网的最优下垂增益设计。该方法在数据收集后，通过反向训练ANN模型，用于满足特定系统性能要求的最优控制设计。这种创新性的设计策略在直流微电网控制领域具有一定的突破性，但其实际应用效果和稳定性仍需进一步验证。

title: Scalable Neural Network Control for Nonlinear DC Microgrids Under Plug-and-Play Operations
abstract: Plug-and-play (PnP) operations of distributed generation units (DGUs) with constant power loads (CPLs) often destabilize dc microgrids (DCmGs). To address this issue, this article proposes a scalable neural network control strategy for nonlinear DCmGs with CPLs, enabling seamless PnP operations of DGUs. A radial basis function neural network is employed to handle the uncertain CPL nonlinearity wit...
ai_summary: 本文提出了一种可扩展的神经网络控制策略，用于解决带有恒功率负载的分布式发电单元在直流微电网中的即插即用操作问题，具有一定的学术创新性。

title: Inverse Application of Artificial Intelligence for the Control of Power Converters
abstract: This article proposes a novel application method, inverse application of artificial intelligence (IAAI) for the control of power electronic converter systems. The proposed method can give the desired control coefficients/references in a simple way because, compared to conventional methods, IAAI only relies on a data-driven process with no need for an optimization process or substantial derivations...
ai_summary: 本文提出了一种新颖的人工智能逆应用方法（IAAI），用于电力电子转换器系统的控制。该方法通过数据驱动过程简化了控制系数/参考值的获取，无需优化过程或大量推导，显示出一定的学术创新性。

title: Joint Admission and Power Control for Massive Connections via Graph Neural Network
abstract: The sixth-generation mobile communication system (6G) puts forward higher requirement for connection density, which is difficult to meet with the existing resource management schemes in real time. In this paper, we investigate the graph neural network (GNN) based algorithms for supporting the massive connectivity in 6G. Using the power intensity of the received signal or signal-to-interference-plu...
ai_summary: 本文探讨了基于图神经网络的算法，以支持6G中的大规模连接，显示出对现有资源管理方案的改进和创新。

title: A Novel Adaptive Neural Network Constrained Control for a Multi-Area Interconnected Power System With Hybrid Energy Storage
abstract: This paper concentrates on the problem of control of a hybrid energy storage system (HESS) for an improved and optimized operation of load-frequency control applications. The HESS consists of a supercapacitor serving as the main power source and a fuel cell serving as the auxiliary power source. First, a Hammerstein-type neural network is proposed to identify the HESS, which formulates the Hammers...
ai_summary: 本文提出了一种新颖的自适应神经网络约束控制方法，针对多区域互联电力系统中混合储能系统的控制问题，以优化负载频率控制应用。该方法使用Hammerstein型神经网络来识别HESS，并考虑了HESS的动态特性，显示出在控制策略上的创新性。

title: Transferring Online Reinforcement Learning for Electric Motor Control From Simulation to Real-World Experiments
publication_title: IEEE Open Journal of Power Electronics
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) based methods are an upcoming approach for the control of power systems such as electric drives. These data-driven techniques do not need an explicit plant model like most common state-of-the-art approaches. Instead, the control policy is continuously improved solely based on measurement feedback pursuing optimal control performance through learning. While the general f...
ai_summary: 该论文提出了一种将在线强化学习方法从仿真环境转移到真实世界实验中用于电动机控制的新颖方法，具有一定的学术创新性，但未达到突破性水平。

title: Long-Horizon FCS-MPC Trained 1-D Convolution Neural Networks for FPGA-Based Power-Electronic Converter Control With a Si/SiC Hybrid Converter Case Study
abstract: Conventional long-horizon finite-control-set model predictive control (FCS-MPC) for power electronics has two main real-time implementation problems: 1) calculation burden and latency; and 2) high hardware resource requirements on real-time platforms such as FPGA. To solve these problems, machine learning models have been proposed using model predictive control results as offline training data to ...
ai_summary: 本文提出了一种使用1-D卷积神经网络训练的长视界有限控制集模型预测控制（FCS-MPC）方法，以解决在FPGA平台上实现电力电子转换器控制时的计算负担和硬件资源需求问题。该方法通过机器学习模型利用模型预测控制结果作为离线训练数据，以提高实时性能。论文在Si/SiC混合转换器案例研究中展示了其应用，具有一定的学术创新性。

title: Practical Terminal Sliding Mode Control of Active Power Filters by Self-Organizing Hermite Fuzzy Neural Network
abstract: To mitigate harmonic contamination, this article introduces a supertwisting practical terminal sliding mode controller (STPTSMC) using a self-organizing Hermite fuzzy neural network (SOHFNN) for an active power filter (APF) with unknown model nonlinearities. First, a practical terminal sliding mode because of its benefits in offering a continuous and nonsingular characteristic is adopted, and a su...
ai_summary: 本文提出了一种基于自组织Hermite模糊神经网络的实用终端滑模控制方法，用于未知模型非线性的有源电力滤波器，具有一定的学术创新性。

title: Real-Time Nonlinear Model Predictive Control of Active Power Filter Using Self-Feedback Recurrent Fuzzy Neural Network Estimator
abstract: A real-time nonlinear model predictive control using a self-feedback recurrent fuzzy neural network (SFRFNN) estimator for an active power filter is developed to improve the performance of harmonic compensation. First, an SFRFNN with a recurrent structure and fuzzy rules is proposed as a prediction model for nonlinear systems. The SFRFNN merges the advantages of the fuzzy system and the recurrent ...
ai_summary: 该论文提出了一种基于自反馈递归模糊神经网络估计器的实时非线性模型预测控制方法，用于改善有源电力滤波器的谐波补偿性能。该方法结合了模糊系统和递归神经网络的优势，具有一定的创新性，但未达到突破性创新的水平。

title: Application of Artificial Neural Network-Based Tool for Short Circuit Currents Estimation in Power Systems With High Penetration of Power Electronics-Based Renewables
abstract: The increasing integration of Power Electronics (PE)-based renewable energy sources into the electric power system has significantly affected the traditional levels and characteristics of fault currents compared to the ones observed in power systems dominated by synchronous generating units. The secure operation of a renewable rich power system requires the proper estimation of fault currents with...
ai_summary: 该论文提出了一种基于人工神经网络的工具，用于估计高渗透率电力电子型可再生能源电力系统中的短路电流，具有一定的创新性。

title: Novel Neural Network Fractional-Order Sliding-Mode Control With Application to Active Power Filter
publication_title: IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems
abstract: In this article, a fractional-order sliding-mode control scheme based on a two-hidden-layer recurrent neural network (THLRNN) is proposed for a single-phase shunt active power filter. Considering the shortcomings of traditional neural networks (NNs) that the approximation accuracy is not high and weight and center vector of NNs are unchangeable, a new THLRNN structure which contains two hidden lay...
ai_summary: 本文提出了一种基于双隐藏层递归神经网络的分数阶滑模控制方案，用于单相并联型有源电力滤波器。该方案针对传统神经网络在逼近精度不高和权重及中心向量不可变的问题，提出了一种新的THLRNN结构。

title: Power Calculation Using RBF Neural Networks to Improve Power Sharing of Hierarchical Control Scheme in Multi-DER Microgrids
publication_title: IEEE Journal of Emerging and Selected Topics in Power Electronics
abstract: All control methods for the decentralized control of distributed energy resources (DERs) in the microgrid need to calculate power to decide whether the power produced will be able to stabilize the system. Unlike the previous research that is limited to the primary and secondary control levels, the presented decentralized droop-based control scheme includes detailed modeling for three hierarchical ...
ai_summary: 该论文提出了一种使用径向基函数(RBF)神经网络进行功率计算的方法，以改善多分布式能源资源(DER)微电网中分层控制方案的功率共享。与以往仅限于初级和次级控制层的研究不同，该控制方案详细建模了三个层次，展示了在微电网中实现更稳定系统的潜力。论文具有一定的创新性，但是否达到突破性水平仍需进一步验证。

title: Practical design of a three-phase active power-line conditioner controlled by artificial neural networks
abstract: Today, there is an increase of harmonic pollution in electrical systems due to the use of nonlinear loads. Thus, the current and voltage waveforms are nonsinusoidal. The active power-line conditioners (APLCs) are used to compensate the generated harmonics and to correct the load power factor. In this paper, a new APLC control design based on artificial neural networks is developed. Adaptive networ...
ai_summary: 本文提出了一种基于人工神经网络的三相有源电力线调节器(APLC)控制设计，用于补偿非线性负载产生的谐波并纠正负载功率因数。该设计具有一定的创新性，但未提供足够的信息来判断其是否具有突破性的贡献。

title: A Stochastic Digital Implementation of a Neural Network Controller for Small Wind Turbine Systems
abstract: This letter presents a reconfigurable hardware implementation of feed-forward neural networks using stochastic techniques. The design is based on the stochastic computation theory to approximate the nonlinear sigmoid activation functions with reduced digital logic resources. The large parallel neural network structure is then implemented on a reconfigurable field-programmable gate array (FPGA) dev...
ai_summary: 本文提出了一种基于随机技术的前馈神经网络硬件实现方法，通过减少数字逻辑资源来近似非线性S型激活函数，并在可重配置的FPGA上实现了大型并行神经网络结构。该方法在硬件实现方面具有一定的创新性，但未达到突破性创新的水平。
